Z0d\S
SEToolsExceptionz&Base class for all SETools exceptions.N
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
__doc__
7/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/setools/exception.pyr
PolicyrepExceptionz(Base class for all policyrep exceptions.Nr
LowLevelPolicyErrorz
    Exception for low-level policy errors.  This is typically due to
    errors accessing policy data structures.  The policy may be
    malformed or there may be an SETools bug.Nr
InvalidPolicyz
Exception for invalid policy.Nr
MLSDisabledz)
    Exception when MLS is disabled.
    Nr
InvalidSymbolz
    Base class for invalid symbols.  Typically this is attempting to
    look up an object in the policy, but it does not exist.
    Nr
InvalidBooleanz
Exception for invalid Booleans.Nr
InvalidCategoryz%Exception for invalid MLS categories.Nr
InvalidClassz%Exception for invalid object classes.Nr
InvalidCommonz-Exception for invalid common permission sets.Nr
InvalidInitialSidz#Exception for invalid initial sids.Nr
InvalidLevelz)
    Exception for an invalid level.
    Nr
InvalidLevelDeclz5
    Exception for an invalid level declaration.
    Nr
InvalidPermissionz.
    Exception for an invalid permission.
    Nr
InvalidRangez)
    Exception for an invalid range.
    Nr
InvalidRolez
Exception for invalid roles.Nr
InvalidSensitivityz/
    Exception for an invalid sensitivity.
    Nr
InvalidTypez+Exception for invalid types and attributes.Nr
InvalidUserz
Exception for invalid users.Nr
InvalidRuleTypez!Exception for invalid rule types.Nr
InvalidBoundsTypez)Exception for invalid *bounds rule types.Nr
InvalidConstraintTypez'Exception for invalid constraint types.Nr
InvalidDefaultTypez&Exception for invalid default_* types.Nr
InvalidFSUseTypez%Exception for invalid fs_use_* types.Nr
InvalidMLSRuleTypez%Exception for invalid MLS rule types.Nr
InvalidRBACRuleTypez&Exception for invalid RBAC rule types.Nr
InvalidTERuleTypez$Exception for invalid TE rule types.Nr
SymbolUseErrorz
    Base class for incorrectly using an object.  Typically this is
    for classes with strong similarities, but with slight variances in
    functionality, e.g. allow vs type_transition rules.
    Nr
RuleUseErrorz
    Base class for incorrect parameters for a rule.  For
    example, trying to get the permissions of a rule that has no
    permissions.
    Nr
ConstraintUseErrorz8Exception when getting permissions from a validatetrans.Nr
NoStatementzt
    Exception for objects that have no inherent statement, such
    as conditional expressions and MLS ranges.
    Nr
InvalidDefaultValuez1Exception for invalid default (not source/target)Nr
InvalidDefaultRangez#Exception for invalid default rangeNr
NoCommonzJ
    Exception when a class does not inherit a common permission set.
    Nr
NoDefaultsz8Exception for classes that have no default_* statements.Nr
RuleNotConditionalzs
    Exception when getting the conditional expression for rules
    that are unconditional (not conditional).
    Nr
TERuleNoFilenamezc
    Exception when getting the file name of a
    type_transition rule that has no file name.
    Nr
InvalidCheckerConfigz.Base class for invalid checker configurations.Nr
InvalidCheckerModulez6Exception when an unknown checker module is requested.Nr
InvalidCheckOptionz2Exception for invalid options in a checker module.Nr
InvalidCheckValuez;Exception for invalid values for a checker module's option.Nr
PermissionMapExceptionz-Base class for all permission map exceptions.Nr
PermissionMapParseErrorz>Exception for parse errors while reading permission map files.Nr
RuleTypeErrorz3Exception for using rules with incorrect rule type.Nr
UnmappedClassz'Exception for classes that are unmappedNr
UnmappedPermissionz+Exception for permissions that are unmappedNr
